subItems.title: Lost part of my list when adding new lists
Refactor Views
subItems.desc:
Views are bulky and have a lot of repeating code.

Reconsider the way projectView and renderAll are structured with project buttons in the render all section, etc.

subItems.title: Form Object
subItems.desc: The update form should be its own object with its own methods.
subItems.notes: Probably held in a property of the view class.

subItems.title: Priority Styling
subItems.desc:
Items should show color change based on priority.

Maybe reorder in list with high priority at the top?

subItems.title: Add instructions and logo
subItems.desc: Instructions for use of the app, and an explanation of steimling technologies reasoning for providing it. "World domination is complicated, and we're here to help you organize your efforts" or some such.

subItems.title: Also it updates the first list.
And new subitems did not display without refreshing
Move event listeners to correct modules
subItems.desc: index.js currently holds a bunch of published events that belong elsewhere.
subItems.notes: Most event listeners should be in View while the business logic is held in Controller.
